prompt: Create a cinematic ultra-realistic vertical portrait of a muscular shirtless man with wet black slicked-back hair and a trimmed beard, his face intentionally hidden by a flat opaque brown rectangular censor block standing back-to-back with a massive silverback gorilla with wet black fur, shown in right-facing profile with a small dark blurred censor block over its mouth. The man is on the left in a three-quarter side pose, cropped from the hips up, with defined chest, shoulders, abs, and arms covered in rain droplets; he wears dark low-waisted pants and has a serious powerful posture. The gorilla is on the right, taller and broader, its shoulder and head pressed close behind the man, with detailed wet fur, visible ear, brow ridge, nostril, and intense eye. Set them in a lush jungle valley during heavy rain, with misty green mountains in the background and a dramatic cloudy sky glowing with warm sunlight near the upper right. Use moody golden-hour backlight with cool storm shadows, high contrast, shallow depth of field, photoreal skin texture, glossy water highlights, atmospheric haze, and a gritty adventure-movie poster look. The composition should be vertical 3:4, subjects filling most of the frame, no text, no logos, no extra people or animals.
